title: Align supply-chain evidence with release identity
outOfScope: Publishing or tagging v0.5.39, creating a provider release, or dispatching release workflows.
Changing the fail-closed public distribution rule or making an unpublished release appear public.
Quick Install validation and unrelated planned Work Items.
Deleting dirty user worktrees or discarding uncommitted changes.
Creating a separate budget-only Work Item or rewriting historical archive evidence.

sources.reason: Align release evidence and governance terminology.
Current generated release-digest identity and comparison behavior.
Release preflight identity and lifecycle checks.
Candidate baseline containing finalizer identity fields.
Regression coverage for generated and baseline evidence.

riskAssessment.reason: The correction changes the generated release-evidence identity tuple; it must preserve fail-closed mismatch detection and the unpublished-release distribution barrier.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized root-cause release-obstacle correction with publication explicitly out of scope.

preReviewWarnings: Review that sourceCommit, tagTarget, and metadataCommit remain one concrete identity tuple.
Review that stale or mismatched evidence still fails closed.
Review that public distribution remains blocked until the real v0.5.39 publication exists.
acceptance: Generated release-digests include the same concrete sourceCommit, tagTarget, and metadataCommit tuple used by the freeze finalizer.
The candidate release-evidence baseline passes comparison after finalizer identity fields are present.
Focused regression tests cover the identity tuple and stale or mismatched evidence.
Distribution still fails closed before the v0.5.39 public tag; no publication semantics are weakened.
Formatting, budget, AI Finish, archive, PR, merge, and ai-close-work-item complete; no tag or release is created by this Work Item.
guidelines: Fail closed on release identity mismatch.
Preserve the distinction between candidate evidence and published evidence.
Do not weaken the public distribution gate.
Do not rewrite historical immutable archive evidence.

intent.problem: The freeze finalizer writes tagTarget and metadataCommit as part of the concrete release identity, but the supply-chain generator omits them and therefore rejects the finalized candidate baseline.
constraints: Keep release publication out of scope.
Keep the existing fail-closed comparison behavior.
intent.rationale: The identity tuple must have one source of truth so a finalized candidate can pass evidence validation without deleting evidence fields or weakening a guard.

rawUserRequest: 继续扫清发布版本之前的障碍；统一 finalizer 与 supply-chain 的 release identity；不绕过 distribution 的未发布门禁；完成完整 Contract/Preflight/PR/合并/ai-close-work-item。

declaredIntent.summary: Align generated supply-chain release evidence with the finalized release identity without publishing the release or weakening distribution checks.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User authorized root-process correction for the release obstacle; publication remains out of scope.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record evidence before implementation and before lifecycle closure.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: A finalized candidate uses one concrete sourceCommit, tagTarget, and metadataCommit tuple.
scenarioCoverage.reason: Implementation and verification are pending; before_finish must record positive alignment evidence.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: A stale or mismatched identity field is rejected by the evidence comparison.
scenarioCoverage.reason: Implementation and verification are pending; before_finish must record negative-path evidence.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Distribution remains blocked while v0.5.39 is not a public tag.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore the generated-evidence tests and policy reservation without rewriting prior archive records.

repaymentRecords: release_evidence_identity_compat|pythonLines|32000|40400|user|2026-07-24|Record the cumulative executable ceiling for this functional release-identity correction; repay during final plan cleanup, not through a budget-only Work Item.
